'''gadhazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycroprotein|mycroprotein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycroprotein|mycroprotein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gadhazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædhæzhæth|gædhæzhæth]] || [[word:gædhæzhæj|gædhæzhæj]] || [[word:gædhæzhæsh|gædhæzhæsh]] || [[word:gædhæzhæ|gædhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhadhazhath|gadhadhazhath]] || [[word:gadhadhazhaj|gadhadhazhaj]] || [[word:gadhadhazhash|gadhadhazhash]] || [[word:gadhadhazha|gadhadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhazhath|gadhazhath]] || [[word:gadhazhaj|gadhazhaj]] || [[word:gadhazhash|gadhazhash]] || [[word:gadhazha|gadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhafzhath|gadhafzhath]] || [[word:gadhafzhaj|gadhafzhaj]] || [[word:gadhafzhash|gadhafzhash]] || [[word:gadhafzhaf|gadhafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadhazhatha|gadhazhatha]] || [[word:gadhazhaja|gadhazhaja]] || [[word:gadhazhasha|gadhazhasha]] || [[word:gadhazhaka|gadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadhazhath|gadhazhath]] || [[word:gadhazhaj|gadhazhaj]] || [[word:gadhazhash|gadhazhash]] || [[word:gadhazha|gadhazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadhazhathal|gadhazhathal]] || [[word:gadhazhajal|gadhazhajal]] || [[word:gadhazhashal|gadhazhashal]] || [[word:gadhazhakal|gadhazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadhazhathatha|gadhazhathatha]] || [[word:gadhazhajaja|gadhazhajaja]] || [[word:gadhazhashasha|gadhazhashasha]] || [[word:gadhazhaka|gadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadhazhathan|gadhazhathan]] || [[word:gadhazhajan|gadhazhajan]] || [[word:gadhazhashan|gadhazhashan]] || [[word:gadhazhakan|gadhazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadhazhathaoro|gadhazhathaoro]] || [[word:gadhazhajaoro|gadhazhajaoro]] || [[word:gadhazhashaoro|gadhazhashaoro]] || [[word:gadhazhakaoro|gadhazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
